name: superpowers
description: Discipline-governed harness: TDD, systematic debugging, plan writing, verification-before-completion. Use when correctness matters and wrong is expensive.

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: Write a feature/bugfix where correctness matters, red-green-refactor.
examples: write this feature with tests first

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: Find the root cause before fixing; don't guess.
examples: find the root cause before the fix

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.description: Turn a settled direction into a concrete step-by-step TDD plan.
examples: write a step-by-step plan an implementer can follow

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: Diverge on approaches when no direction is chosen yet.
